What are mRNA vaccines and how do they work? 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
Vaccines help prevent infection by preparing the body to fight foreign invaders (such as bacteria, viruses, or other pathogens). All vaccines introduce into the body a harmless piece of a particular bacteria or v
